name: Delete a book from search bar in Palace
fullName: Search libraries and books: Delete a book from search bar in Palace

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
And  Enter book 'El gato negro' and save it as 'bookNameInfo'
When  Clear search field on catalog books screen
Then  Search field is empty on catalog books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Delete a book from search bar in Palace

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Delete a book from search bar in Palace
